hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE=$(cat | jq -r ".file_path // empty" 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(ts|tsx)$ ]] && [ -f "$FILE" ]; then PRETTIER=/Users/risingcore/Desktop/work/oddscast/server/node_modules/.bin/prettier; [ -f "$PRETTIER" ] && "$PRETTIER" --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'FILE=$(cat | jq -r ".file_path // empty" 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$FILE" ] && exit 0; for pat in ".env" ".env.local" ".env.production" ".env.railway"; do if [[ "$FILE" == *"$pat" ]]; then echo "⛔ Protected file blocked: $FILE" >&2; exit 2; fi; done; exit 0'

echo '
📋 Docs 갱신 체크리스트 (변경사항 있을 경우):
  - [ ] docs/TODO_CONTINUE.md
  - [ ] docs/architecture/API_SPECIFICATION.md  (API 변경 시)
  - [ ] docs/architecture/DATABASE_SCHEMA.md   (스키마 변경 시)
  - [ ] docs/architecture/BUSINESS_LOGIC.md    (로직 변경 시)
  - [ ] docs/WEBAPP_ADMIN_GAPS.md              (Gap 해결 시)
'
